import.title: Importar fases y tareas
import.uploadIntro: Sube un archivo CSV con datos de fases y tareas
import.optionalFieldsList: phase_name, task_description, assigned_to, estimated_hours, actual_hours, due_date, priority, service, task_type, status, tags
import.defaultPhaseNote: Las tareas sin phase_name se agruparán en "{{phaseName}}"
import.mapFieldsTitle: Asignar campos de tarea a columnas CSV
import.fieldInstructions: Selecciona qué columna CSV contiene los datos de cada campo. Los campos marcados con * son obligatorios.
import.rowLimitExceeded: Se superó el límite de filas:
import.rowLimitDescription: Your CSV has {{original}} rows, but only the first {{kept}} rows will be imported. Please split your file into smaller batches for the remaining rows.
import.skipInvalidRowsHelp: Continuar la importación incluso si algunas filas tienen errores de validación
import.unmatchedAgentsWarning: from your CSV don't match existing users. You'll be asked to map these in the next step.
import.unmatchedStatusesWarning: from your CSV don't match existing project statuses. You'll be asked to resolve these {{timing}}.
import.invalidRowsBlockingError: have validation errors. Enable "Skip invalid rows" to proceed with only the valid rows, or go back and fix your CSV.
import.largeImportConfirmHelp: I understand this will create {{phases}} phase(s) and {{tasks}} task(s). This action may take a while to complete.
import.agentResolutionIntro: The following agent names from your CSV don't match any existing users. Choose how to handle each one. The first agent in a comma-separated list becomes the primary assignee, and additional agents become task resources.
import.skipPrimaryAgentHelp: Tasks where this is the primary agent will be imported without an assignee.
import.skipAdditionalAgentHelp: This additional agent will not be added to the affected tasks.
import.statusResolutionIntro: The following statuses from your CSV don't match any existing project statuses. Choose how to handle each one:
import.noStatusSpecified: Usar la columna "Sin estado especificado" (se creará si es necesario)
import.mapAgentRequiredError: Selecciona un usuario de destino para todas las resoluciones "Asignar a usuario existente" antes de continuar.
import.mapStatusRequiredError: Selecciona un estado de destino para todas las resoluciones "Asignar a existente" antes de importar.
import.largeImportHelp: Estás importando {{tasks}} tareas. El procesamiento puede tardar un momento.
import.successSummary: Se crearon {{phases}} fases y {{tasks}} tareas correctamente
import.emptyCsvError: CSV file is empty or has no data rows

statuses.arrange_hint: Arrange statuses in the order tasks will flow through them.
statuses.none_selected_hint: Haz clic en "Agregar estado" para añadir estados al proyecto.
statuses.selector_none_selected_hint: Haz clic en "Agregar existente" para seleccionar estados disponibles o en "Crear nuevo" para agregar uno.
statuses.add_phase_from_library_title: Agregar estado de fase desde la biblioteca
statuses.no_statuses_available_hint: Primero crea estados en Configuración → Proyectos → Estados.
statuses.task_status_library_title: Biblioteca de estados de tareas del proyecto
statuses.task_status_library_description: Manage your organization's project task statuses. These statuses can be used across all projects.
statuses.task_status_library_empty: No se encontraron estados de tareas del proyecto
statuses.task_status_library_empty_hint: Crea tu primer estado para comenzar
statuses.status_name_placeholder: p. ej., En progreso, Bloqueado, etc.
statuses.sample_task_hint: Así es como se verán las tareas en la columna
statuses.mark_closed_help: Tasks with this status will be considered complete
statuses.save_failed: Failed to save status. Please try again.
statuses.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete the status "{{statusName}}"? This cannot be undone.
statuses.delete_in_use: Failed to delete status. It may be in use by projects.
statuses.project_statuses_description: Define the workflow stages for your projects. Mark statuses as "closed" to indicate project completion.
statuses.project_closed_hint: Projects with this status will be marked as closed
statuses.project_open_hint: Projects with this status will remain open
statuses.last_closed_error: Al menos un estado debe permanecer marcado como cerrado
statuses.last_closed_delete_error: No se puede eliminar el último estado cerrado para este tipo.

statuses.manage_description: Defina las columnas de estado para las tareas en esta plantilla. Arrastre para reordenar.

basics.namePlaceholder: p. ej., Desarrollo web, Migración de red
basics.nameHelp: Give your template a descriptive name that reflects the type of project
basics.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe para qué se usa esta plantilla y cualquier detalle importante...
basics.descriptionHelp: Provide context to help users understand when to use this template
basics.categoryHelp: Organize templates by category for easier filtering
basics.nextHintDescription: After defining the basics, you'll set up status columns, add phases, create tasks, configure client portal visibility, and review your template before saving.

phases.title: Fases del proyecto
phases.intro: Break down your project into phases. Each phase can have its own tasks and timeline.
phases.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe qué sucede en esta fase...
phases.reorderedHint: Phases reordered. Would you like to recalculate offsets based on phase order and durations?
phases.aboutTimingStartOffset: Days after the project start date when this phase begins. New phases auto-calculate their offset based on preceding phases.
phases.aboutTimingDuration: How long this phase typically takes. Used to calculate the next phase's offset.
phases.aboutTimingTip: After reordering phases, use "Recalculate Offsets" to update timing based on the new order.

tasks.title: Tareas
tasks.taskNamePlaceholder: p. ej., Diseñar el esquema de base de datos
tasks.description: Agrega tareas a cada fase. También puedes añadir elementos de lista para desglosar mejor las tareas.
tasks.tipDescription: Add checklist items to break down complex tasks into smaller steps. These will help team members track progress within each task.
tasks.emptyDescription: Agrega al menos una fase en el paso anterior antes de añadir tareas.
tasks.serviceHint: Autocompleta el servicio al crear entradas de tiempo desde tareas.

review.title: Revisa tu plantilla
review.name: Nombre:
review.description: Revisa los detalles de tu plantilla antes de crearla. Puedes editar cualquier sección volviendo atrás.
review.readyDescription: Once you create this template, you'll be able to use it to quickly start new projects with this structure. Click "{{action}}" to finish.

clientPortal.title: Visibilidad en el portal del cliente
clientPortal.description: Configure what information clients can see when viewing projects created from this template in the client portal.
clientPortal.aboutTitle: Sobre la visibilidad en el portal del cliente
clientPortal.aboutDescription: These settings control what project information is visible to clients when they access the client portal. You can choose to show phases, task completion progress, and specific task details. These settings will be applied to all projects created from this template but can be customized per project.

errors.loadRequiredData: No se pudieron cargar los datos necesarios
errors.templateNameRequired: El nombre de la plantilla es obligatorio
